args.code: (async()=>{const inputs=[...document.querySelectorAll('input')]; const textInput=inputs.find(i=>!i.disabled&&['text','search',''].includes(i.type)); if(textInput){textInput.focus(); textInput.value='B0CZ7F61XN'; textInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true})); textInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true}));} const buttons=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].map(n=>({n,t:(n.innerText||n.textContent||'').trim()})); const b=buttons.find(x=>x.t==='搜索'||x.t.includes('搜索')); if(b)b.n.click(); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,2500)); const text=document.body.innerText||''; const i=text.indexOf('B0CZ7F61XN'); return JSON.stringify({clicked:!!b,inputSet:!!textInput,found:i>=0,excerpt:i>=0?text.slice(Math.max(0,i-260),i+500):text.slice(0,1500),url:location.href});})()
